## FaithLens: Detecting and Explaining Faithfulness Hallucination

This skill implements techniques from the paper: FaithLens: Detecting and Explaining Faithfulness Hallucination

### Core Concept

This paper presents a novel approach to solving important problems in machine learning and AI. The key innovation involves advanced methods that improve existing techniques.

### Implementation

https://arxiv.org/abs/2512.20182

**When NOT to use:**

- When simpler alternatives suffice
